case_title: CELFIA MALDONADO et al VS. ORALIA HERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-06-2003. AUG-01-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY CELIA MALDONADO AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, RAUL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-16-2003.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-13-2003.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DAVID RICHARD HARRISON.
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF COUNSEL
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, CELFIA MALDONADO, RAUL ON DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ORALIA DOES 1 TO 10

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-30-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. MAR-16-2004 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, CELFIA MALDONADO, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ORALIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-01-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-17-2003

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT - ADR INFO PACKAGE W/BLANK STIPULATION TO ADR & CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FORMS, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, CELFIA MALDONADO, RAUL SERVED APR-04-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ORALIA
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ALAN SAM LEVINS.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT EDWARD WHITE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-17-2003 THROUGH JAN-15-2004.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-17-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE-REQUESTED TO BE RELIEVED. THE FEB-17-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-16-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR DAVID M. FRIED.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALDONADO, CELFIA MALDONADO, RAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ORALIA PLAINTIFF CELFIA AND RAUL MALDONADO RECOVER FROM THE DEFENDANT ORALIA HERNANDEZ THE SUM OF $22,285.36 (WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST THROUGH 1/04 AND ATTY FEES OF $2,000.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ORALIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ORALIA
ARBITRATOR DAVID MICHAEL FRIED APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-14-2003 THROUGH FEB-12-2004.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-30-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
